tasks.label: bundle current file
tasks.command: oj-bundle ${file} > submit.cpp; (Get-Content submit.cpp) -replace '^#line', '// #line' -replace '(cerr|std::cerr).+?;', ';' | Set-Content submit.cpp; code submit.cpp

tasks.label: setup random test
tasks.command: Get-Content 'template/template.cpp' | Set-Content 'gen.cpp'; Get-Content 'template/template.cpp' | Set-Content 'ans.cpp'; Get-Content 'template/checker.cpp' | Set-Content 'che.cpp'; code gen.cpp ans.cpp che.cpp

tasks.label: run random test (compare tokens)
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope Process; checker/judge.ps1 ${file} gen.cpp ans.cpp checker/wcmp.cpp

tasks.label: run random test (max error 1e-6)
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope Process; checker/judge.ps1 ${file} gen.cpp ans.cpp checker/rcmp6.cpp

tasks.label: run random test (max error 1e-9)
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope Process; checker/judge.ps1 ${file} gen.cpp ans.cpp checker/rcmp9.cpp

tasks.label: run random test (custom judge)
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope Process; checker/judge.ps1 ${file} gen.cpp ans.cpp che.cpp
